descriptionText: Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale | Guest Cabins:5 | Crew Cabins:4Build on OrderThe Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale represents a fresh direction in the world of luxury power catamarans, offering a balance of contemporary design, practical layout solutions, and a comfortable cruising experience. Built on order and presented in good condition, she stands out as the flagship of Sunreef’s new ULTIMA series, developed in collaboration with Phathom Studio. This partnership has resulted in a yacht that carries an automotive‑inspired profile while maintaining the well‑known spaciousness and refinement associated with Sunreef’s multihull platforms.Yacht Main Specifications: • Brand: Sunreef • Year: Build on Order • Length: 33 m • Max Beam: 9.6 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 2 m • Gross Tonnage: 400 GT • Guest Cabins: 5 • Crew: 6 • Engines: 2 x MTU 10V 2000At 33 metres in length and featuring a generous 9.6‑metre beam, the Sunreef Ultima 111 provides a wide, open atmosphere onboard, suited to both private family cruising and charter use. Her FRP construction keeps her robust yet manageable, while the thoughtful layout across three levels ensures an uninterrupted flow from one space to another. A defining feature of this model is the open‑concept atrium staircase positioned at the heart of the yacht, which connects all decks and enhances the sense of light and openness.The yacht’s interior and exterior spaces are arranged to offer comfort without compromising privacy. The crew areas and service pathways have been organised with efficiency in mind, allowing discreet movement and maintaining a calm environment for guests. With five guest cabins and accommodation for six crew, the Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale is tailored for extended stays at sea while ensuring smooth onboard operations.Outdoor living is one of her strongest attributes. The aft deck is equipped with a glass hot tub, offering a relaxed atmosphere for guests wishing to unwind while enjoying direct views over the water. Fold‑open balconies on the side terraces extend the available lounging space and create an easy connection to the sea. The upper deck lounge provides another welcoming area for dining, reading, or simply enjoying time underway or at anchor. Direct bow access adds practicality and improves circulation across the yacht.Powered by twin MTU 10V 2000 engines, the yacht delivers dependable performance suitable for a variety of cruising plans. While specific speed and tank capacity details vary depending on final configuration, the platform is designed for efficient operation and comfortable long‑range capability.Overall, the Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale offers a thoughtful combination of style, utility, and comfort. Her condition, layout, and modern design direction make her an appealing option for buyers seeking a new multihull yacht with well‑defined living and social areas. She brings together the advantages of a power catamaran with a contemporary aesthetic, making her suitable for owners who appreciate balanced design and purposeful functionality.
descriptionHtml:
Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale | Guest Cabins:5 | Crew Cabins:4

Build on Order

The Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale represents a fresh direction in the world of luxury power catamarans, offering a balance of contemporary design, practical layout solutions, and a comfortable cruising experience. Built on order and presented in good condition, she stands out as the flagship of Sunreef’s new ULTIMA series, developed in collaboration with Phathom Studio. This partnership has resulted in a yacht that carries an automotive‑inspired profile while maintaining the well‑known spaciousness and refinement associated with Sunreef’s multihull platforms.

Yacht Main Specifications:
• Brand: Sunreef
• Year: Build on Order
• Length: 33 m
• Max Beam: 9.6 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 2 m
• Gross Tonnage: 400 GT
• Guest Cabins: 5
• Crew: 6
• Engines: 2 x MTU 10V 2000

At 33 metres in length and featuring a generous 9.6‑metre beam, the Sunreef Ultima 111 provides a wide, open atmosphere onboard, suited to both private family cruising and charter use. Her FRP construction keeps her robust yet manageable, while the thoughtful layout across three levels ensures an uninterrupted flow from one space to another. A defining feature of this model is the open‑concept atrium staircase positioned at the heart of the yacht, which connects all decks and enhances the sense of light and openness.

The yacht’s interior and exterior spaces are arranged to offer comfort without compromising privacy. The crew areas and service pathways have been organised with efficiency in mind, allowing discreet movement and maintaining a calm environment for guests. With five guest cabins and accommodation for six crew, the Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale is tailored for extended stays at sea while ensuring smooth onboard operations.

Outdoor living is one of her strongest attributes. The aft deck is equipped with a glass hot tub, offering a relaxed atmosphere for guests wishing to unwind while enjoying direct views over the water. Fold‑open balconies on the side terraces extend the available lounging space and create an easy connection to the sea. The upper deck lounge provides another welcoming area for dining, reading, or simply enjoying time underway or at anchor. Direct bow access adds practicality and improves circulation across the yacht.

Powered by twin MTU 10V 2000 engines, the yacht delivers dependable performance suitable for a variety of cruising plans. While specific speed and tank capacity details vary depending on final configuration, the platform is designed for efficient operation and comfortable long‑range capability.

Overall, the Sunreef Ultima 111 For Sale offers a thoughtful combination of style, utility, and comfort. Her condition, layout, and modern design direction make her an appealing option for buyers seeking a new multihull yacht with well‑defined living and social areas. She brings together the advantages of a power catamaran with a contemporary aesthetic, making her suitable for owners who appreciate balanced design and purposeful functionality.
